title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 26 - 2017: 40 kilometers in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder late at night after a long work day spent measuring distances/circles in Google Earth for a mapping project, estimating it will take three days total. He also finished listening to 'Dark Money' by Jane Mayer and wants to listen to it repeatedly, make a webpage about it, and use it to attract Patreon donors.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Worth listening to multiple times; wants to build a webpage around it and tie it to Patreon fundraising
Tedious but worth it — once set up, subsequent use is easy
Using them as design reference examples for his own new website

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like it's March 26th, 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at 11 today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked until 3 a.m. yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got about 8 hours of sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's currently 2 a.m.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to go to bed now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today was my first day working on distances from my circles areas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I organized the work wrong by having them separately instead of grouped together.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think it will take me three days total to finish this task.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The effort is worth it because once I've helped the Google Earth Park, it's just clicking on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow everything will change from one year to the next.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll try to clean my earth, fix my turn tomorrow, and take photos to upload.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished listening to the book 'Dark One' by Jane Mayor.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to listen to 'Dark One' again, probably three to five times to fully understand it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to make a web page about 'Dark One' to help get donors from my Patreon page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope to finish the circles task in three more weeks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I mentioned the Kato Institute or the old foundation or the libertarian website in relation to Jane Mayor's work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to use certain websites as examples for my new website designs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My new website will be called 'Bright Barred News' and will sell design services.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to use the libertarian website as an example for my designs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think it's 3:16 a.m. and I need to sleep.
